data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies user decision-making by limiting choices and providing a streamlined UI.
data.technical_spec: Design principles that reduce cognitive load via simplified navigation and layout.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes touch targets for easier user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Ensures buttons and interactive elements are adequately sized and spaced.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhances user experience by combining aesthetic appeal with usability.
data.technical_spec: Clean visual design that balances color schemes and typography.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Utilizes familiar design patterns to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Consistency with commonly recognized UI practices found on other platforms.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Improves content organization by grouping related items together.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping of content sections and features to enhance clarity.
